title: Production Systems
learningObjectives: Implement a skill with a named hook point (pre_research, pre_synthesis, post_synthesis, or post_wiggum) and wire an auto-trigger predicate to it.
Describe how the orchestrator decomposes compound tasks into subtasks, executes them in parallel via ThreadPoolExecutor, and assembles the final output.
Explain the three layers of the security module (AST scanner, path sandbox, injection scanner) and identify what each layer can and cannot catch.
Calculate the token cost of a multi-stage run from a runs.jsonl entry and explain the keep-alive model hot-loading strategy.
Instrument a new pipeline stage with Chrome Trace Event spans and verify the output in Perfetto UI.
